solution.p: First we square each side to obtain a quadratic equation. Then we can rearrange that into standard form.
Now we can identify a={1}\text{,} b={-8}\text{,} and c={15}\text{,} and apply the quadratic formula.
The only possible solutions are 3 and 5\text{.} They each check as valid solutions in the original equation, so the solution set is {\left\{3,5\right\}}\text{.}
